title: [HandshakeToFIRRTL] Add support for `index_cast`, `zexti` and `trunci` ops
body:
zexti and trunci operations generate handshake components which wrap around FIRRTL `pad` and `bits` operations. The builder for each of these ops is used to support `index_cast`, which pads or truncates an input type compared to the fixed index-width (64 bits).

Notably, this introduces a bug/new issue wrt. how submodules are named; currently, this is fully dependent on the result type of the operand that is being converted. With these unary ops, the operand type also matters, and must be factored into the name of the submodule.
